overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a red plaid shirt and helmet walking through a snowy mountain town. The character moves along paved roads past wooden houses and parked vehicles under clear blue winter skies, with snow-covered hills and pine trees surrounding the area.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy residential street with parked vehicles

events.description: character steps from snow-covered sidewalk onto the asphalt road edge
passing red pickup truck parked on the left side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snowy roadside, passing a wooden bench and red pickup truck

entered.detail: two-story wooden house with snow-covered roof and multiple windows
park bench with wooden slats situated on snow-covered ground
red pickup truck parked along the left side of the street
tall modern street lamp with dual lights

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a snowy residential area with a brown wooden house ahead. The character walks past a wooden bench on the right and continues along the road edge, passing a red pickup truck parked on the left. The environment is bright and clear with snow covering the ground and rooftops.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain road with snow banks

events.description: passing white SUV parked on the left side of the road
road opens up with large snow-covered hillside becoming visible on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along the open road, passing a white SUV and approaching a large snow-covered hillside

entered.detail: white SUV with dark windows parked on the left roadside
large snow-covered hillside rising on the right side of the road
large brown building situated on top of the snow-covered hill

segments.scene_description: The character moves along a more open stretch of road, passing a white SUV parked on the left. The environment transitions to show a large snow-covered hillside on the right with a prominent brown building situated on top. Pine trees line the background, and the road continues winding ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding mountain road with elevated building

events.description: road curves to the right, bringing the large hillside building closer into view

agents.ego_description: walking along the winding road with the large brown building on the hillside dominating the right side of the view

entered.detail: low stone wall running along the left edge of the road

segments.scene_description: The road curves gently through the snowy landscape, with a large brown building perched on the snow-covered hillside to the right becoming more prominent. A stone wall appears along the left side of the road. The character continues along the winding asphalt path surrounded by snow banks and pine trees.

events.description: approaching and crossing the marked crosswalk at the road intersection
slight left turn while continuing through the intersection

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection, crossing the crosswalk, and continuing along the curving road

entered.detail: T-intersection with roads joining from the left and continuing forward
marked pedestrian crosswalk lines across the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a road intersection marked with a crosswalk. After crossing the intersection, the road continues winding through the snowy town with residential buildings visible on the left. The large hillside building is left behind as the character moves forward into a slightly more open area of the town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a snowy residential neighborhood that gradually opens into a winding road leading toward the heart of a mountain town. It begins by following the character past a brown wooden house and a red pickup truck parked along a bright, snow-covered street. As the character moves forward, the scene expands to reveal a large brown building perched atop a prominent snow-covered hillside to the right, while a white SUV passes on the left. The road then curves gently, shifting the perspective to include a stone wall on the left and a denser backdrop of pine trees as the hillside building becomes more central. Finally, the camera follows the character across a marked crosswalk at an intersection, leaving the hillside behind as the path winds further into the open residential area of the town.
